findings: check_human_required_to_gate_passing correctly validates T10 guards via human_decision_record.validate_record()
T10 guards human_decision_recorded and decision_evidence_attached both formally extracted and required to be true
Fail-closed: missing record, nonexistent record, invalid JSON, missing evidence, tampered exit_conditions all block transition
check_transition() correctly dispatches to T10 guard for human_required to gate_passing
8 new tests cover fail-closed, valid record, no evidence, nonexistent, invalid JSON, tampered conditions, dispatch
limitations: Only T01 and T10 have guard implementations; other transitions still validity-only
evidence_files in decision record are path strings without disk existence verification
PACK_MANIFEST metadata run_id differs from prompt run_id; should unify metadata
